title: ixora lucens
intro: Ixora lucens, also known as the West Indian jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ixora lucens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used in various parts of the world to harness its medicinal properties.
